creator: sawp@sawp.com.br
text:
X-tile is a gnome applet for your panel (or optionally a standalone application, working with kde as well) that allows you to select a number of windows and tile them in different ways.
This is especially useful for comparing products in separate web pages, or for programmers refering to documentation as they are programming.

Fix: Please, rename the x-tile.txt to x-tile.shar

Patch attached with submission follows:
